form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (18.18) when fifth over 305m at this track in a Other. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and four places from 10 starts. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.53) when fourth over 390m at Warrnambool in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed seven times. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors two back when third (22.98) over 390m at Warrnambool. Has a squeeze box to navigate but capable of a better result.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 13 over 390m at Warrnambool in a Grade 5. Likely to struggle this time.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but swamped late when a close up fourth (23.46) at this track over 400m. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

form.formComment: Won her last two including a strong win last start over 400m at this track by 1.3 lengths in a Grade 2/3/4. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.
